title: ruellia geayi
intro: Ruellia geayi, also known as the blue trumpet flower or wild azul, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ruellia geayi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe irritated throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
